mixed_hunk_review.recommended_action: Manual hunk selection required for priority1_options.py and priority1_backtest.py before Commit A. Do not commit full-file diffs.

proposed_commit_strategy: Three-phase commit plan when user explicitly approves: Commit A (P1.7B.23 shadow wiring with manual hunk selection), Commit B (P1.7B.24 verification), Commit C (P1.7B.25 this review). Never include Commit E (production-path) or git add . Commit D (research artifacts) optional and separate.

proposed_commit_groups.name: Shadow wiring implementation (P1.7B.23)
files: selected hunks: backend/core/priority1_backtest.py (sidecar guard + flag propagation only)
proposed_commit_groups.suggested_commit_message: Add disabled-by-default NR3+FCC shadow wiring (P1.7B.23). Flag defaults false; served output unchanged; no activation.
prerequisites: Manual hunk selection on mixed files complete

proposed_commit_groups.suggested_commit_message: Add P1.7B.24 shadow wiring verification and diff review (no activation).
prerequisites: Commit A reviewed or staged separately

proposed_commit_groups.name: Commit scope review (P1.7B.25)
proposed_commit_groups.suggested_commit_message: Add P1.7B.25 commit scope and release safety review (plan only).
prerequisites: User explicit approval for any commit

prerequisites: Never mix with Commit A without approval

proposed_commit_groups.purpose: API, config, env, calibration, diagnostics changes
